# DiamondPercent

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::DiamondPercent;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        DiamondPercent { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
verified, unverified, sale, discount, offer, marketing, sticker, price tag

## Categories
social, finance, shopping, math

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/diamond-percent)
